tools.name: about.driveAboutGet
tools.description: Gets the information about the current user along with Drive API settings

tools.name: apps.driveAppsGet
tools.description: Gets a specific app.

tools.name: apps.driveAppsList
tools.description: Lists a user's installed apps.

tools.name: changes.driveChangesGet
tools.description: Deprecated - Use changes.getStartPageToken and changes.list to retrieve recent changes.

tools.name: changes.driveChangesGetStartPageToken
tools.description: Gets the starting pageToken for listing future changes.

tools.name: changes.driveChangesList
tools.description: Lists the changes for a user or shared drive.

tools.name: changes.driveChangesWatch
tools.description: Subscribe to changes for a user.

tools.name: channels.driveChannelsStop
tools.description: Stop watching resources through this channel

tools.name: children.driveChildrenDelete
tools.description: Removes a child from a folder.

tools.name: children.driveChildrenGet
tools.description: Gets a specific child reference.

tools.name: children.driveChildrenInsert
tools.description: Inserts a file into a folder.

tools.name: children.driveChildrenList
tools.description: Lists a folder's children.

tools.name: comments.driveCommentsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a comment.

tools.name: comments.driveCommentsGet
tools.description: Gets a comment by ID.

tools.name: comments.driveCommentsInsert
tools.description: Creates a new comment on the given file.

tools.name: comments.driveCommentsList
tools.description: Lists a file's comments.

tools.name: comments.driveCommentsPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing comment.

tools.name: comments.driveCommentsUpdate
tools.description: Updates an existing comment.

tools.name: drives.driveDrivesDelete
tools.description: Permanently deletes a shared drive for which the user is an organizer. The shared drive cannot contain any untrashed items.

tools.name: drives.driveDrivesGet
tools.description: Gets a shared drive's metadata by ID.

tools.name: drives.driveDrivesHide
tools.description: Hides a shared drive from the default view.

tools.name: drives.driveDrivesInsert
tools.description: Creates a new shared drive.

tools.name: drives.driveDrivesList
tools.description: Lists the user's shared drives.

tools.name: drives.driveDrivesUnhide
tools.description: Restores a shared drive to the default view.

tools.name: drives.driveDrivesUpdate
tools.description: Updates the metadata for a shared drive.

tools.name: files.driveFilesCopy
tools.description: Creates a copy of the specified file. Folders cannot be copied.

tools.name: files.driveFilesDelete
tools.description: Permanently deletes a file by ID. Skips the trash. The currently authenticated user must own the file or be an organizer on the parent for shared drive files.

tools.name: files.driveFilesEmptyTrash
tools.description: Permanently deletes all of the user's trashed files.

tools.name: files.driveFilesExport
tools.description: Exports a Google Workspace document to the requested MIME type and returns exported byte content. Note that the exported content is limited to 10MB.

tools.name: files.driveFilesGenerateIds
tools.description: Generates a set of file IDs which can be provided in insert or copy requests.

tools.name: files.driveFilesGet
tools.description: Gets a file's metadata or content by ID.

tools.name: files.driveFilesInsert
tools.description: Insert a new file.

tools.name: files.driveFilesList
tools.description: Lists the user's files.

tools.name: files.driveFilesListLabels
tools.description: Lists the labels on a file.

tools.name: files.driveFilesModifyLabels
tools.description: Modifies the set of labels on a file.

tools.name: files.driveFilesPatch
tools.description: Updates a file's metadata and/or content. When calling this method, only populate fields in the request that you want to modify. When updating fields, some fields might change automatically, such as modifiedDate. This method supports patch semantics.

tools.name: files.driveFilesTouch
tools.description: Set the file's updated time to the current server time.

tools.name: files.driveFilesTrash
tools.description: Moves a file to the trash. The currently authenticated user must own the file or be at least a fileOrganizer on the parent for shared drive files. Only the owner may trash a file. The trashed item is excluded from all files.list responses returned for any user who does not own the file. However, all users with access to the file can see the trashed item metadata in an API response. All users with access can copy, download, export, and share the file.

tools.name: files.driveFilesUntrash
tools.description: Restores a file from the trash. The currently authenticated user must own the file or be at least a fileOrganizer on the parent for shared drive files. Only the owner may untrash a file.

tools.name: files.driveFilesUpdate
tools.description: Updates a file's metadata and/or content. When calling this method, only populate fields in the request that you want to modify. When updating fields, some fields might be changed automatically, such as modifiedDate. This method supports patch semantics.

tools.name: files.driveFilesWatch
tools.description: Subscribes to changes to a file. While you can establish a channel for changes to a file on a shared drive, a change to a shared drive file won't create a notification.

tools.name: parents.driveParentsDelete
tools.description: Removes a parent from a file.

tools.name: parents.driveParentsGet
tools.description: Gets a specific parent reference.

tools.name: parents.driveParentsInsert
tools.description: Adds a parent folder for a file.

tools.name: parents.driveParentsList
tools.description: Lists a file's parents.

tools.name: permissions.drivePermissionsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a permission from a file or shared drive.

tools.name: permissions.drivePermissionsGet
tools.description: Gets a permission by ID.

tools.name: permissions.drivePermissionsGetIdForEmail
tools.description: Returns the permission ID for an email address.

tools.name: permissions.drivePermissionsInsert
tools.description: Inserts a permission for a file or shared drive.

tools.name: permissions.drivePermissionsList
tools.description: Lists a file's or shared drive's permissions.

tools.name: permissions.drivePermissionsPatch
tools.description: Updates a permission using patch semantics.

tools.name: permissions.drivePermissionsUpdate
tools.description: Updates a permission.

tools.name: properties.drivePropertiesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a property.

tools.name: properties.drivePropertiesGet
tools.description: Gets a property by its key.

tools.name: properties.drivePropertiesInsert
tools.description: Adds a property to a file, or updates it if it already exists.

tools.name: properties.drivePropertiesList
tools.description: Lists a file's properties.

tools.name: properties.drivePropertiesPatch
tools.description: Updates a property.

tools.name: properties.drivePropertiesUpdate
tools.description: Updates a property.

tools.name: replies.driveRepliesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a reply.

tools.name: replies.driveRepliesGet
tools.description: Gets a reply.

tools.name: replies.driveRepliesInsert
tools.description: Creates a new reply to the given comment.

tools.name: replies.driveRepliesList
tools.description: Lists all of the replies to a comment.

tools.name: replies.driveRepliesPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing reply.

tools.name: replies.driveRepliesUpdate
tools.description: Updates an existing reply.

tools.name: revisions.driveRevisionsDelete
tools.description: Permanently deletes a file version. You can only delete revisions for files with binary content, like images or videos. Revisions for other files, like Google Docs or Sheets, and the last remaining file version can't be deleted.

tools.name: revisions.driveRevisionsGet
tools.description: Gets a specific revision.

tools.name: revisions.driveRevisionsList
tools.description: Lists a file's revisions.

tools.name: revisions.driveRevisionsPatch
tools.description: Updates a revision.

tools.name: revisions.driveRevisionsUpdate
tools.description: Updates a revision.

tools.name: teamdrives.driveTeamdrivesDelete
tools.description: Deprecated use drives.delete instead.

tools.name: teamdrives.driveTeamdrivesGet
tools.description: Deprecated use drives.get instead.

tools.name: teamdrives.driveTeamdrivesInsert
tools.description: Deprecated use drives.insert instead.

tools.name: teamdrives.driveTeamdrivesList
tools.description: Deprecated use drives.list instead.

tools.name: teamdrives.driveTeamdrivesUpdate
tools.description: Deprecated use drives.update instead.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
